description: A multi-column text layout block for splitting content into 2-4 parallel columns. Each column has its own heading and rich text body. Use for comparing features side-by-side, service descriptions, or breaking up dense content. Layout: equal-width responsive grid stacking to single column on mobile.
label: Text Columns
